
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{"products":[{"__typename":"Consultancy"},{"__typename":"Cosmo"},{"__typename":"SDK"}]},"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"name":"CONSULTANCY"},"path":["products",0]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"isLeadAvailable":false},"path":["products",0]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"lead":{"id":1,"derivedMood":"HAPPY"}},"path":["products",0]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
